title: 32 Pcs Wedding Table Numbers Cards, 1-30 Pink Bow Flower Double Sided Wedding Table Numbers Signs with Head and Gift Table Card Party Centerpiece for Birthday Bridal Event Reception
features: 1-30 Table Numbers Cards: The package includes 32 pieces wedding table numbers cards, including 1-30 table numbers, 1pc head table card and 1pc gift table card, enough quantity can meet your party table reception needs. size is about 4 x 6 inch (10 x 15 cm)

Double Sided Display: High-precision printing, vibrant pink bow with flower patterns with clear digital details, double-sided information display, easily recognizable from a distance, convenient for party seating arrangements
Paper Material: Printed on premium quality white card stock, ensuring a durable design, perfect for framing or standing alone
Careful Packaging: Each set of wedding table number cards is carefully packaged in a box to ensure they arrive in pristine condition

Wide Range of Applications: Suitable for weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, bridal showers, family gatherings, baby showers, graduations, Thanksgiving, Christmas, or other occasions, and reusable. These number cards will fit perfectly into your various events and add a sophisticated touch to your event
